description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring a driveway, trees, and shrubs. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a covered porch, flanked by large windows and a garage to one side. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is enclosed by low hedges and fencing, with paved walkways connecting the main entrance, driveway, and backyard amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The exterior is light-colored with clean lines and minimal decoration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway extension, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and symmetrical window arrangement on the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and additional landscaping, with the driveway extending to the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with a single main door, steps leading up, and minimalistic columns or supports.
